text:
## Issue: kapow-731 — Implement internal/csvutil for importer

Package: tools/kapow/internal/csvutil/ (NOTE: the module is at `tools/kapow`, not `tools/importer`)

Header-mapped CSV/TSV reader wrapping encoding/csv.

API:
- NewReader(r, opts...) with WithDelimiter, WithLazyQuotes
- Row type with String(col), Int(col), Float(col), OptionalString(col), OptionalInt(col), OptionalFloat(col)
- Handle missing columns gracefully (return zero/nil)

Unit tests with embedded test CSV data.

Done when: Unit tests cover normal parsing, TSV, missing columns, type coercion, quoted values.

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/csvutil"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
If verification fails, STOP and report the error to the team lead.

ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.
NEVER cd back to the main repo directory. Commit and push ONLY on
your worktree branch — never touch main.

When done, push your branch:
```bash
git push -u origin HEAD
```

## Existing scaffold context

The module is `github.com/ketang/kapow/tools/kapow` with go.mod at `tools/kapow/go.mod`. 
The directory `tools/kapow/internal/csvutil/` exists but is empty.
Dependencies available: pgx/v5, golang.org/x/text.

The existing config package is at `tools/kapow/internal/config/config.go`.

## Quality Gate (must pass before reporting done)

Run from your worktree root:
```bash
cd tools/kapow && go test ./internal/csvutil/... -v -race -count=1
cd tools/kapow && go vet ./...
```

## Instructions
- Follow CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md conventions
- Write implementation code AND comprehensive unit tests
- Use `package csvutil` 
- Error wrapping: `fmt.Errorf("csvutil: context: %w", err)`
- Commit your work on the worktree branch with a descriptive message
- Report back with quality gate results when done

feat: implement tools/kapow/internal/csvutil

Header-mapped CSV/TSV reader wrapping encoding/csv. Provides NewReader with
WithDelimiter and WithLazyQuotes options, and a Row type with String, Int,
Float, OptionalString, OptionalInt, OptionalFloat accessors that handle
missing columns gracefully (zero/nil). 10 unit tests cover normal CSV, TSV,
missing columns, type coercion, quoted values, lazy quotes, optional empty
fields, EOF, header-only files, and error paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Commit csvutil implementation"},"permission_updates":[]}}
